display.purpose: Page titles and major doc headings — Geist semibold, fixed rem.

body.purpose: UI copy and prose at 14px; max 65–75ch in long passages.

mono.purpose: Code blocks and CLI snippets — JetBrains Mono only.

shadows.name: card-sm
shadows.purpose: Default Card component lift for doc preview panels.

motion.name: ease-standard
motion.purpose: Button and UI state transitions (transition-all on Button).

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Main CTA — install, get started, submit.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 0.5rem; height: 2rem; padding: 0.5rem 1rem; font-family: Geist, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1; color: oklch(0.98 0 0); background: oklch(0.55 0.23 275); border: none; border-radius: 0.45rem; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.15s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); outline: none; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: color-mix(in oklch, oklch(0.55 0.23 275) 90%, transparent); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px color-mix(in oklch, oklch(0.5576 0.0222 57.81) 50%, transparent); }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Header nav and secondary actions — Docs, GitHub link.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; height: 1.75rem; padding: 0.375rem 0.75rem; font-family: Geist, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.8125rem; font-weight: 500; color: oklch(0.2416 0.0219 57); background: transparent; border: none; border-radius: 0.45rem; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.15s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); outline: none; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: oklch(0.88 0.008 95); } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px color-mix(in oklch, oklch(0.5576 0.0222 57.81) 50%, transparent); }

components.name: Card
components.description: Doc preview panels and content containers.
components.html:
Bar chart
Preview content area
components.css: .ds-card { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 1.5rem; padding: 1.5rem; background: oklch(0.993 0.003 95); color: oklch(0.2416 0.0219 57); border: 1px solid oklch(0.892 0.006 95); border-radius: calc(0.45rem + 4px); box-shadow: 0 1px 2px 0 rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.05); } .ds-card-title { font-family: Geist, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 1.125rem; font-weight: 600; line-height: 1.3; } .ds-card-body { font-family: Geist, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; line-height: 1.5; color: oklch(0.5576 0.0222 57.81); }

components.name: Border-only Card
components.description: Inline demo tiles — nqui-card pattern, no shadow.
components.css: .ds-card-flat { padding: 1rem; background: oklch(0.993 0.003 95); color: oklch(0.2416 0.0219 57); border: 1px solid oklch(0.892 0.006 95); border-radius: calc(0.45rem + 4px); font-family: Geist, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; }

components.name: Code Block
components.description: Shiki-highlighted CLI and TSX snippets in docs.
components.css: .ds-code { margin: 0; padding: 1rem; font-family: JetBrains Mono, ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: 0.8125rem; line-height: 1.6; background: oklch(0.98 0 0); color: oklch(0.145 0 0); border: 1px solid oklch(0.892 0.006 95); border-radius: 0.45rem; overflow-x: auto; }

components.name: Landing Header
components.description: Sticky docs site header with logo, nav, theme toggle area.
components.css: .ds-header { position: sticky; top: 0; z-index: 50; width: 100%; background: color-mix(in oklch, oklch(0.982 0.0054 95) 80%, transparent); backdrop-filter: blur(8px); border-bottom: 1px solid oklch(0.892 0.006 95); } .ds-header-inner { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; height: 3.5rem; max-width: 72rem; margin: 0 auto; padding: 0 1.5rem; } .ds-logo { font-family: Geist, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 600; color: oklch(0.2416 0.0219 57); } .ds-header-nav { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.25rem; }

narrative.overview: NQChart's visual system is a technical field guide dressed as a product UI. Warm paper neutrals with a single violet primary for actions and chart series slot 1. Density is comfortable for docs and dashboard demos; nothing shouts except the charts. Dark mode uses neutral charcoal surfaces, not glowing-on-black.
keyCharacteristics: Restrained accent: primary on buttons, links, and chart-1 only
Geist sans for UI; JetBrains Mono for code
Flat elevation by default; shadow-sm on cards only
Chart previews are the visual hero

rules.name: The One Voice Rule
rules.body: Primary violet appears on ≤10% of any docs screen — CTAs, active nav, one chart series emphasis. Its rarity is the point.

rules.name: The Paper Not Cream Rule
rules.body: Backgrounds stay high-lightness with minimal chroma. Warmth comes from hue 95 tint, not saturated sand/cream body fills.

rules.name: The Code Is Data Rule
rules.body: Monospace is for code, config keys, and numeric tabular data — never for marketing headings or button labels.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces rest flat. Shadow appears only on cards/previews or button hover feedback — never stacked card-in-card elevation.

dos: Do use OKLCH CSS variables from globals.css for all new UI surfaces.
Do map chart colors through ChartConfig → var(--chart-N) so light/dark stay synchronized.
Do keep docs chrome quieter than the charts in preview panels.
Do use ghost buttons for secondary header actions; reserve primary for main CTAs.
Do verify muted text contrast on tinted backgrounds before shipping docs changes.
donts: Don't use gradient text, purple-to-blue hero gradients, or neon accents on dark mode.
Don't use border-left or border-right greater than 1px as colored accent stripes on cards, alerts, or callouts.
Don't nest cards inside cards in docs layouts.
Don't use cream/sand body backgrounds with high warmth chroma.
Don't put display-sized typography or monospace on navigation labels and buttons.
Don't ship modals when inline expansion or docs sections would teach the same thing.
